SEARCH
Package net.sf.jailer.util

Klasse JobManager

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.util.JobManager
public abstract class JobManager extends Object
Executes a job-list in a concurrent way.
Autor:
Ralf Wisser

    JobManager.Job
    A job to be managed by a JobManager.

      protected abstract void onException(Throwable t)

      Parameter:
